The target is `Pallets/Werkzeug`'s `safe_join` function at commit `cd8be56a8a3cd70ed359cfaeeee6905933b1e07a`, a widely-used path-safety primitive. A path-containment oracle tests whether any non-`None` return from `safe_join` escapes the trusted base directory after normalization.
